message:
feat(robot): add drift baseline save/load and --robot-drift detection

Implements --save-baseline (persists snapshot to .bv/baseline.json) and
--robot-drift (compares current state against baseline with severity-ranked
alerts for new cycles, density growth, blocked increase, actionable changes,
node/edge count shifts, and PageRank ranking drift). Exit codes: 0=clean,
1=critical, 2=warning.

All 7 drift unit tests pass.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -272,6 +272,12 @@ pub struct Cli {
     #[arg(long)]
     pub robot_causality: Option<String>,
 
+    #[arg(long)]
+    pub save_baseline: Option<String>,
+
+    #[arg(long, action = ArgAction::SetTrue)]
+    pub robot_drift: bool,
+
     #[arg(long)]
     pub export_md: Option<PathBuf>,
 
@@ -332,5 +338,7 @@ impl Cli {
             || self.robot_blocker_chain.is_some()
             || self.robot_impact_network.is_some()
             || self.robot_causality.is_some()
+            || self.save_baseline.is_some()
+            || self.robot_drift
     }
 }
